items.name: Lamborghini Backpack
items.description: Unleash the spirit of speed and sophistication with the Black and Gold Lamborghini Bull Backpack. This virtual accessory merges luxury and style, featuring a sleek black design accentuated by golden detailing and the iconic Lamborghini bull logo, creating a bold statement for those who appreciate the pinnacle of automotive elegance in the Roblox universe. Upgrade your avatar's look and embody the essence of high-performance fashion with this exclusive backpack. Available from 12/29.
